tickets.text: My order #12345 has not arrived yet. It's been 10 days since I placed the order and tracking hasn't updated.
I was charged twice for the same subscription renewal. I need a refund for the duplicate charge immediately.
The app keeps crashing when I try to upload files. I've tried reinstalling but nothing works.
I can't log into my account. The password reset email never arrives. I've checked spam.
I'd like to know if you offer student discounts on your premium plan.
I received the wrong item in my package. I ordered a blue shirt but got a red one.
